title: Default+
description: simple resource pack for vanilla and PvP!
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a08eadc447806aa30b7eb02f281eb9f1227ba6f.png)

# About
This resource pack is perfect for players who want to enhance their Minecraft experience while keeping the vanilla atmosphere, but with some tweaks for a better PvP gameplay experience. It includes a series of changes that make the game more comfortable, especially in combat and regular gameplay:

Small items — The reduced item models make the inventory cleaner and easier to navigate, especially when quickly accessing the right items.

Small shield — The shield now takes up less space on the screen, giving you more freedom of view while maintaining its functionality in combat.

Small fire texture — The fire looks tidier and doesn't distract you, making the game more pleasant and balanced.

Reduced particles — Some particles (like when pop) have been reduced, so they don’t interfere with your PvP matches or clutter the screen.
